title: Cubitt CT2S Series 3 Smart Watch 1.69" Touch Screen, Fitness Tracker, with Heart Rate, Blood Oxygen, Stress and Sleep Monitor, IP68 Waterproof, Step Counter, Pedometer Smartwatch for Women Men
features: PREMIUM DISPLAY: Large 1.69-inch TFT-LCD color HD touch screen featuring customized displays, wake up function to easily see time, date, steps, calories and distance. You can personalize the dial with many of our style options, and can even upload a personal picture to be on your smart watch background

SMART FUNCTIONS: Receive Call, Text, Whatsapp and Social Media notifications. Incoming calls can be alerted via vibration reminders, with the option to hang up. Display up to 128 characters on your tracker screen. Sedentary alerts can be turned On, to be alerted with vibration reminders after a specific time of no movement. Alarm clock + timer, and calendar alerts are also shown on the screen as notifications. Option to sync data with Strava

ALL DAY FITNESS TRACKING: Track your daily activities with a built-in accelerometer sensor that allows you to track distance traveled, record steps, get calories burned, and review active minutes, including pace. Your workout progress can be simply viewed directly from our app, by choosing between 14 different sports modes including Outdoor / Outdoor Running and Walking, Outdoor cycling, Spinning bike, Cricket, Hiking, Swimming, Yoga,Rowing machine, Elliptical trainer, Fitness, and others

HEART RATE, BLOOD OXYGEN, SLEEP AND STRESS MONITOR: Automatically monitors your daily heart rate, blood oxygen and stress. You can read directly on the watch all day, which helps you understand your health and make reasonable adjustments on your life style. Also monitors your sleep which gives you a comprenhensive analysis of your sleep. Our app allows you to review graphs that analyze how deep or light is your sleep and your wake-up times.

APP PAIRING AND BATTERY: pairing is simple, by using Bluetooth 4.2, automatically sync your device to a phone using iOS 8. 0/Android OS 4. 4 or above. Built with a 300mAh battery that takes less than 2 hours to charge and can be used for up to 10 days with a standby time of 30-45 days. You can adjust the screen brightness according to your needs

reviews.title: Great watch for a great price
reviews.text: I was skeptical about the watch as I had purchased other watches only to have them fail miserably. This watch turned out great. The most important thing to do is read the manual. Especially about how to wear the watch, which is a little higher than a normal watch. This will make the accuracy much better. The step counter is controlled by arm movement not actual steps, so if you walk stiff armed , it will be inaccurate. Move your arms when walking , the watch will be much more accurate.Make sure you go into the app on your phone and activate the exercises your interested in. This will help the watch to track it better. Also activate the media part of the app for sms,email etc. You can also monitor who is calling you, so you can choose to answer you phone or not. I am extremely pleased with my purchase and will be watching for other products from this company.

reviews.title: Loved it..: til it burned me!
reviews.text: I loved it until I woke up with a burn!!

reviews.title: As advertised
reviews.text: Great watch! Exactly what I wanted (a watch to count steps and that is easy to read). The set up was fairly easy - I received the watch in the early evening and had it set up within half an hour ( I am in my seventies). This is my 3rd watch - first was very expensive and too invasive - second watch cost twice as much as this one and quit charging in the second week - third times a charm.

reviews.title: Hard to set up.
reviews.text: Very difficult to program. I will be sending it back.

reviews.title: There were very little instructions on how to use/set up the watch.  Had to go online to search.
reviews.text: Face of watch is good, and seems like good quality.  Plus I like that it is a touch screen/can swipe.

title: Garmin Forerunner 245, GPS Running Smartwatch with Advanced Dynamics, Berry
description: You do the running. Forerunner 245 does the thinking. This GPS smartwatch doesn’t just tell you where you ran. It tracks your stats, crunches the numbers and gets to know all about your performance, your running form, your training history and even your goals. All you need to focus on is putting one foot in front of the other.Bezel Material: fiber-reinforced polymer.
features: GPS running smartwatch with advanced training features
Battery life: up to 7 days in smartwatch mode and up to 24 hours in GPS mode
Get free adaptive training plans from Garmin Coach, or create your own custom workouts on our Garmin Connect online fitness community

Provides advanced running dynamics, including ground contact time balance, stride length, vertical ratio and more (When used with Running Dynamics Pod or HRM-Run or HRM-Tri monitors (sold separately))
Safety and tracking features include incident detection (during select activities) which sends your real-time location to emergency contacts through your paired compatible smartphone
Customize with free watch faces, apps and more from our Connect IQ store
Evaluates your current training status to indicate if you’re undertraining or overdoing it; offers additional performance monitoring features

reviews.title: great looking watch and great for running and biking
reviews.text:
I really like this watch. I replaced and old forerunner. (many generation old) It feels great and looks good since you can download and tailor the watch faces. I have downloaded music to it using MediaMonkey and it worked fine. So far, synching with earbuds Jaybird Tarah Pro and Vistas, has been good. The availability of watch faces and activity widgets is nice.
But
Be warned, it takes a little bit to set it up and understand how to understand how to download and update activity widgets. Updating of watch faces isn't too bad. Be patient and read the user guide, there is a lot of functionality you should be aware of whether you use them or not.

reviews.title: Great purchase
reviews.text:
Great, does all of the stuff running nerds love. Spotify is a hassle to sync when i want to adjust my playlists. This is especially annoying for podcast listeners such as myself. For this reason, I could have gone without the music upgrade and just used my phone but I still use the music feature a good amount for my shorter speed runs where I need the running jams!

But obviously I didn’t take a star because Garmin is the GOAT

reviews.title: Great watch
reviews.text: I bought this for my husband, an avid runner, for our anniversary. He is super into tracking, numbers, stats, etc. And he loves this watch! He previously had the Forerunner 235 Garmin but it was probably close to five years old. He had done alot of research on this one verses the newer models and this one still came out ahead and did not disappoint!

reviews.title: great fitness watch!
reviews.text: if you are looking for a smart watch, then this is not for you. however, if you want a fitness watch, then get this one! the gps tracking is great and accurate! it takes a little bit to get used to the buttons and where all the settings are, but i love that i can customize it to do just what i want in terms of display, audio outputs, etc. the band is comfortable and the watch face is a good size to see my stats while working out without being overly cumbersome (i'm a small 5'0" female). i love that it can play my spotify playlists! the only thing of note is that it will not be able to get any data such as weather, sms notifications, calendar updates, emails, phone calls, or send emergency assistance notices unless you have your phone with you and connected via bluetooth. the point of this watch for me was to keep my phone at home so those features don't work during my run, but it does do the fitness tracking and play previously setup spotify playlists, so it's exactly what i want and need. i don't use it for sleep tracking since i only wear it during workouts. love the heart rate monitoring too!

reviews.title: Sleep Tracking and Incoming Call Notification (on android) are EPIC failures
reviews.text:
Overwhelming 5 start reviews really make me skeptical that the reviews themselves are genuine....
Overall the watch is not bad but really needs functional work. The Android Dev/QA team should have some re-training/structuring after releasing this to the general public...
Sleep tracking shows me as sleeping if I am in bed relaxed watching tv during sleep hours, making it useless. I only receive an incoming call notification on the watch if my phone screen is unlocked...
missed calls come in every time..

no problems with GPS, Battery Life, Music , Bluetooth, feeds to 3rd party athletic tracking apps. all those work fine.

Not sure I would buy this again.

features: Galaxy Watch3 combines powerful technology with a premium, customizable design so you can manage the day-today from your wrist, beautifully.
Keep an eye on wellness with advanced health monitoring, and go for days without charging.

Keep an eye on your fitness and health with SpO2, VO2 max, and heart-rate monitoring. Help is just a tap away if you stumble. And track your cycle in an easy and discreet way. *This device and related software are not intended for use in the diagnosis of disease or other conditions, or in the cure, mitigation, treatment or prevention of disease. SPO2, VO2 max and running coach features not available at the time of launch, will become available during Q3. Features will require a software update. **This device and related software are not intended for use in the diagnosis of disease or other conditions, or in the cure, mitigation, treatment or prevention of disease. ***Trip detection recognizes falls when engaged in dynamic motion, not when still. Requires network connection to notify emergency contact. GPS accuracy may be affected by obstructions to satellite signal such as buildings.
Galaxy Watch3 combines style—two sizes, three colors, 50,000-plus watch faces and premium leather bands—with military-grade durability and water resistance.
Spend your time moving while Galaxy Watch3 tracks seven popular activities automatically. Get more out of each movement thanks to a built-in run coaching.

reviews.title: Great watch, much better than my old "smart" watch
reviews.text:
I got Moto 360 several years ago when smart watches first came out and it was nice, but annoying. It was tied into everything and kept giving me alerts and so eventually I got tired of it. My wife also had a first generation Samsung Gear watch and that was about the same as the Moto.
Well, fast forward a few years and now my wife, daughter, son and daughter-in-law all have newer smart watches (Apple Watches and Fitbit) and they all love them. It was time to get a new phone, so I got a Samsung S20 FE and then decided to get the Samsung watch. I saw on the reviews that it really works well with Samsung phones and so I decided to get the Watch 3. I was looking at the Watch 2, which had a few less features and then I found the Watch 3 in the 41mm size and then found a refurbished one so I ended up paying about the same for the Watch 3 as I would have for the Watch 2.
I'm very impressed with the watch and really love it. I didn't get the one with a cell phone, it just connects to my phone with bluetooth and/or wifi, but it's really amazing. I get my messages, and can turn off the ones that I don't want and then I also get all the health apps. So, now it tells me to get off my chair and walk around and does EKG and stress tesing and Oxygen levels..
I was concerned that the 41 mm might be too small, but it is a great size for me as you can see from the pic. I have had a Citizen Echo Drive for more than 10 years and it is a little larger, but I like the size of the Watch 3 better.
If you are thinking about getting a watch, this one is a good deal right now and I believe it does work best if you use it with a Samsung phone.

reviews.title: Love the watch, hate the battery.
reviews.text: I don't use the sleep tracking because the watch is bulky and annoying while trying to sleep. The mobile app is ok, constantly running in background.  The battery life sucks, only good for a day and sometimes a day and a half which is to bad because I do love all the things it does. I think I can answer my phone on my watch (still figuring out how) can definitely hang up on unwanted calls and can read messages.  Good pedometer and workout tool. Overall nice watch with crappy battery life.

reviews.title: I like it.
reviews.text: I had to change out the band. The buckle was a pain. I must recharge every day.

reviews.title: Upgrade
reviews.text: I initially gave my mom the first samsung watch and when it went down, she let me have it. Because I initially spoiled her with the first one I figured it was time to upgrade her. And she loves it, her favorite accessory thus far....

reviews.title: The price! Bought refurbished and love it
reviews.text: Love the price, as I only paid $136 because it was refurbished, but looks brand new and works great! Two things that I'm disappointed with 1 no YouTube app to listen to free music 2 must buy a subscription to Spotify! To listen to music on the watch. Besides those two negative things. The watch is a great buy

reviews.title: just what I was hoping for
reviews.text: It did not come with extra screws, which was a bummer.  However I didn't end up needing them, so it worked out.  The new band was incredibly tricky to get on the fit bit itself, I had to enlist my husband's help.  Between the two of us, we managed to get it on.  It didn't help that the holes didn't perfectly line up and were not drilled out completely on the band, luckily the material is stretchy enough that we could work with it/around it.  I would buy it again if I had to.

reviews.title: does what it's supposed to
reviews.text:
*edit: I've found a con and it bugged me enough to update my review. If your phone is on "Do not disturb" and you leave your phone on at night for emergency calls, the watch still vibrates with every text, regardless of whether they're on your emergency list. This is annoying when you're a light sleeper and you get a text for go cart racing or Dairy Queen at 4 am. I'm assuming it would still go off with a call as well.

I have a Garmin Vivofit that for some reason the notification vibrations will work for a couple months, then stop working for a while, then randomly start working again. I was sick of this, and went looking for something not too expensive and found this. I'm still getting used to it, but it vibrates when I get a call or text, so I'm happy so far. The band is very flexible and comfortable, which is nice, since my Vivofit band was a little stiff.

reviews.title: Great watch for the price.
reviews.text: After buying the earlier brands of Fitbit which I loved. I bought myself a Luxe on sale for $100 last December 2021. It didn’t record anything accurately and just didn’t function the way it should. CS was if no help. I switched to Amazfit!  This is a great watch, the battery has lasted over a week. It accurately tells time, my heart rate, steps and I love this watch. It’s great and is so light on my wrist!!

reviews.title: Terrible smart watch, inaccurate and waste of time/money
reviews.text: After 5 months of use I’m done with this. It seems to be getting less accurate every workout. It can’t even get step counts correct. The accuracy of the heart beat monitoring varies too. The sleep monitor is often wrong about awake times so I don’t believe the other sleep data either. The only thing I can believe with this watch is the time of day.

reviews.title: Good budget watch if you don't need always-on display
reviews.text: Overall, this is a very reasonably priced watch with a lot of functionality. However, the fact that it doesn't have the always-on screen option was a deal breaker for me and I had to replace it with one of their other models.

reviews.title: Did not like this nearly as much as my original amazfit bip watch
reviews.text:
I bought an Amazfit Bip watch a year or more ago and have really been enjoying it The app tracks all my cycling trips and the sleep monitoring is useful. Iam really a big fan of the long battery life of the older model.

This watch has a 9 day battery life which is not nearly as long as the 30 days of the original watch.

This watch meausres blood oxygen levels but taking the measurement requires holding your wrist it the right position and takes much longer that the finger tip device Ihave.

I did not exhaustively evaluate the new app that came with this phone but it did not look nearly as good as the original app.

reviews.title: fitbit 3 perforated bands
reviews.text: I purchased these after market bands because the 'large' I got with my fitbit 3 was WAY too big.  It's amazing how much better 1" less in the band fits.  It comes with three colors.  The only thing I am not really super happy about is the silver tone buckle - I am nervous about nickle content as it is an allergy thing for me. The original is black and matches the band. You get 3 full bands, One black... one gray.. and one light aqua blue - it's more of a very light gray blue.  They are a rubbery ? silicone like? material. Smooth, no sharp edges.  They attached easily. So far, so good.  Having said that, I never hesitate to update my reviews should new info seem useful.

reviews.title: doesn't stay on securely
reviews.text: I've purchased one of these in the past and liked it, but the gold color faded so I l reordered another it in black. However, this time, one side kept disconnecting and the attachment site looked defective compared to the other side causing me to almost lose my Fitbit twice. Luckily, I was indoors and heard it drop. I will return it and try a different brand as I fear I will encounter this issue again if I simply replace it.  This style is nice because it's easy to put on and off even with a single hand as opposed to the type of bracelet that comes with the Fitbit.

reviews.title: Worried the magnet will damage device
reviews.text: I wanted a band that would have more variability in fit, and I liked the color, so I ordered this.  It is, indeed, compatible with the Fitbit Sense and I enjoyed it for several days until I had to charge my Sense.  I then discovered that the magnet was so strong that I had difficulty keeping it off the back of my device long enough to get the charger on.  I was worried that strong magnet might damage the circuits and contacted FitBit for their opinion.  They weren't sure, but pointed out that they do have a hook-and-loop wristband in-house that is available.  Since I was also having trouble with the edges of the VNCAS band getting caught on my wool shawl and anything else fuzzy I wore, I decided to ditch it for the FitBit brand option.  Sorry, but I can't recommend this one.

reviews.title: Not Well Made😳
reviews.text: Initially when I bought this watch band, I thought it was nice, solid and seemed to be well made. I've been wearing it just a little over 2 months now and there's some sharp little burrs that have now showed up on the watch band itself and the edges of the other parts are now seeming to be sharp as well and keep getting hung up on my clothing and have also scratched my boyfriend several times. The finish is wearing off on the backside of the magnet connector area so now it looks very tarnished. I do wear it everyday all day long, but I don't feel after such a short period of time it should look so bad and have these sharp edges now. Unfortunately it's past my return window so I'm going to have to just throw it away and get another one. Such a shame because I really like the magnetic band and the color. I'm a little bit leery about buying another similar style for fear that the same thing will happen again. 😳

reviews.title: Cute but it snags
reviews.text: It snags on everything. Ugh. So I can't wear it with nice blouses or sweaters it gets caught and causes holes, runs, etc. Otherwise I love it.

reviews.title: Like the fact that it's magnetic
reviews.text: Be careful since it's magnetic it may stick to your silverware or metal objects

reviews.title: Better slim band, does not fall off!
reviews.text: Nice improvement over the wider band that came with the fitbit, it does not irritate my wrist as much as the original one. Like having the 3 diff colors, and best of all they do NOT fall off like a leather one I tried.

reviews.title: Comfort
reviews.text:
Like the comet of the watch band.
I have a small wrist and the way it folds the excess band in underneath the band is great.

reviews.title: I love the slender style!
reviews.text: This fits as if fitbit had a Medium band. If you need a large, it may be snug. But it's perfect for me. I love the slim band! It makes the watch so much less bulky. And the fitbit clicks right into the clasps and feels secure. I'm getting more colors for sure.

title: Skinomi Screen Protector Compatible with Sony Smartwatch (6-Pack) Clear TechSkin TPU Anti-Bubble HD Film
description:
Protect your Investment
Daily use of your mobile device can cause unsightly scratches, dents, and other unwanted damage. Within a few months, the screen will be difficult to read; the device will decrease in resale value and be embarrassing to show other people. Lower-quality disposable screen protectors seem like a temporary solution for keeping your device looking brand new; though they need constant replacements.
The Only Screen Protector You'll Need
With this problem in mind the founders of Skinomi set out to create a screen protector that's tough, reliable, and long-lasting. Their solution was the Skinomi TechSkin.
Made of a thermoplastic urethane film that is designed to resist abrasion, the TechSkin Screen Protector compatible with the Sony Smartwatch provides impact absorbing military-grade protection for your device. The protector is UV resistant, HD Clear, and goes on invisible. A smooth texture and feel makes it easy to navigate your device as if there was nothing applied. The flexible high-grade film is formulated to be
"self-healing"
which makes it able to stretch, absorb, and even repair scratches and impact damage.
Lifetime Guarantee
We're so confident that you'll love the TechSkin that every Screen Protector comes with a
Lifetime Warranty
. If the Skinomi TechSkin wears off, we will replace it.
The anti-bubble installation process is easy and error-proof. Protect your possessions and never worry about having to replace that old screen protector again.
Skinomi Kit Includes:
Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector
Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector
High Grade Lint-less Microfiber Cloth
High Grade Lint-less Microfiber Cloth
Installation Solution
Installation Solution
Lifetime Warranty
Lifetime Warranty
Made in the USA
Made in the USA
Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector compatible with Sony Smartwatch
Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector compatible with Sony Smartwatch
features: The TechSkin screen protector compatible with Sony Smartwatch is specifically designed using precise laser cutting technology to offer maximum screen coverage. Material flexibility allows total coverage even on curved devices
Self-Healing, flexible, tough, military-grade thermoplastic urethane, designed to absorb impact. The TechSkin is resistant against scratches, punctures, UV light and will not yellow
Easy, error-proof, and anti-bubble installation. Liquid solution allows adjustments during installation. Significantly reduces dust, oil and fingerprint smudges
Optically transparent, virtually invisible, and HD Clear screen protector with smooth glass-like surface and "True Touch" feel. A great alternative to a typical "static cling" PET screen protector
Lifetime Warranty from Manufacturer. Made in the USA. Includes original Skinomi TechSkin Screen Protector compatible with the Sony Smartwatch

reviews.title: 5-star product!
reviews.text: You have to love it when a product, even something as simple as a thin piece of plastic, outperforms your expectations. Packaged extremely well with everything you'd possibly need, I had my watch cleaned, prepped and completed in minutes. I will use the Skinomi brand for my iPad, Kindle Fire and Samsung Galaxy S III as soon as their old (non-Skinomi) screen protectors need replacement.

reviews.title: Really impressed
reviews.text: Got this for my Sony LiveView and while I was shocked to see that the installation process was more than other screen protectors (ie cell phone screen protectors), installation was pretty simple. After it dries, you can't even tell a screen protector is on!

reviews.title: It's soft
reviews.text:
Like another reviewer had mentioned, they are soft. I used a rubber squeegee that I've used on countless other screen savers, and it actually damaged the skin. It has permanent "bubbles" (more like dents) in it that will not go away. Other than that, the fit is perfect. And the skin comes very nicely packaged with everything you could ever need, including a bottle of soapy water for the application.

The attention to detail by Skinomi is second to none. The company gets five stars, but I've got to deduct one for the soft material. Skinomi did include a squeegee, but it's too big for use with this skin. Had I cut it down to size and used it, I may not have "dents" now.

reviews.title: Good idea
reviews.text: This is a good idea to protect the screen. If you where to scratch it you could just replace the screen saver.

title: LCW Smart Watch for iPhone Android, Fitness Tracker Health Watch w/Heart Rate Blood Oxygen Monitor, Body Temperature, 1.4" Touch Screen Smartwatch, Sleep Step Tracker, IP67 Waterproof
description:
Multifunctional Fitness tracker with Color screen
This multifunctional fitness tracker with 0.96-inch color LCD screen, 24 hours dynamic heart rate monitor and blood pressure monitor, sleep monitor,calls and message smart reminder, pedometer, search phone, calorie counter, alarm alert, sedentary reminder, remote camera control, GPS Tracking, etc...
Heart Rate Monitor
24 Dynamic Hours Heart Rate Monitor (Continuous and Automatic), you can view your daily or historical heart rate curve.You can find your own pulse, comfortably on the wrist. Every measurement counts will lets your pulse become your health guide.
Intelligent reminder
Keep it connected with your smartphone via Bluetooth to a range of 10 meters, you can use this smart watch to automatic monitor sleep, sedentary reminder, it will vibrate to remind you if your phone receives a phone call, SMS text messages and SNS messages like Facebook , Twitter, WhatsApp
GPS sport tracking
GPS running connected to the GPS Tracker to show the route in the application. Track your movement all the time through the gaps connected to your phone during running mode to get real-time statistics such as pace and distance on the track. Open the GPS function on your phone and place the GPS tracking in the APPLICATION, then you can see your athletic track and share it on Twitter or Facebook, etc.
Simple charge, Long Standby
The fitness tracker built-in USB plug,simply connect it to any universal power adapter, PC or power bank without requiring a particular adapter, one single charge(about 1-2 hours) gives you up to 5-7 days of working time.
Tips:
1. This fitness tracker uses a USB charging cable to charge and the standby time is usually 5-7 days. 2.The sleep monitor function will activate automatically in night time. Please wear it when sleep,generallywaking up display after 10-30 minutes.
features: 【Multifunctional Smart Watch】24 hours dynamic heart rate monitor and blood pressure monitor, sleep monitor helping you adjust yourself for a healthier lifestyle, calls and message smart reminder, Calorie Counter, pedometer, search phone, sedentary reminder, remote camera control, GPS Tracking etc...
【Blood Pressure Monitor】Smart blood pressure monitor measure your Systolic, Diastolic blood pressure every moment you want, sync record on app by date.

【GPS Sports Tracking 】 Running watch connected GPS tracker to show the route in the app. Track your movement all the time via connected gaps on your phone during run mode to get real time stats like pace and distance on the track.Pairing your bracelet with APP improves your training efficiency.
【See Calls & Messages on Your Wrist】Receive call, calendar, SMS and SNS (Facebook, WhatsApp, LinkedIn, Instagram, and Twitter) notifications on display; never miss the messages that matter.

【Long Standby】The fitness tracker built-in USB plug, simply connect it to any USB block, PC or power bank without requiring a particular adapter, one single charge(about 1-2 hours) gives you up to 5-7 days of working time.
